title: Anybody like Asuka and Rei equally
display_title: Anybody like Asuka and Rei equally
wikitext:
[]: Anybody like Asuka and Rei equally?             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Thu Apr 30, 2009 3:22 pm So I'm new here, and I've been a big fan for years, but I wasn't really aware of this bizarre "culture war" between fans of Rei and Asuka. I"m really sorry if this has been brought up before, but I couldn't help myself~ I'm interested to know if there are people like me who like both. My case is a bit special, as because of a certain mood disorder, I might resemble one or the other on any given day. Usually "Rei days" would be when I'm numb to the world, and don't even blink an eye when some boy falls on me and grabs my tit. I can also be equally messy in taking care of my room, during these periods. I just don't care. The way she devalued herself really struck a chord, and during such days, I feel the same way. (I suppose "rag doll Shinji" would be the extreme version of this.) But I also have "Asuka days" where I'm irritable, but energetic and more out-going. Unlike "Rei days", I want attention. So, today is sort of an "Asuka day", hence why I'm talking about myself in a message board. >_> On such days, I'm more likely to pretty myself up, and try and make boys like me. For the record, I'm way better with the romance than the real Asuka... probably because I'm not fourteen anymore, haha. Some of her "I hate..." moments made me uncomfortable when I first saw NGE... because I'd uttered almost the same things. <_< So watching Neon Genesis Evangelion for the first time, I remember being so interested, because I felt I could identify with so many of the characters (even Shinji, despite him supposedly having a penis). All the people who dislike Shinji or Asuka or whatever... I never understood that, because I've felt I could identify pretty strongly with all the cast. I guess Misato more so when I was doing my undergrad... but I digress! Anybody feel the same way? Or am I like Poland caught between Nazi Germany and Soviet Russia?

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Thu Apr 30, 2009 3:52 pm I respect Asuka for her development and where she ends up, though the road getting there drives me up a tree - whereas I could easily hang out with Rei and get to know her, especially as she becomes more whole. They do seem to be on either ends of a continuum.

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Thu Apr 30, 2009 4:01 pm Why woud you like them euqually? Rei just doesn't cut it compared to Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Thu Apr 30, 2009 4:03 pm I can say that i have attachments to both characters, but on different grounds. I found Rei to be ba very "different", intriguing character, one who prompts analysis almost instantly, and one who is surrounded by mysteries that are tied deeply into the greater plot of NGE. Yet i could never synch up with her in an emotional manner. Something just kept me away. Asuka, on the other hand, despite her unsympathetic personality, managed to touch me in places (emotional places, pervs) where fictional characters rarely manage to touch me. More so than anything, she made me really sad, and i can say that she was probably the single character (well, aside from Shinji) to whom i formed a genuine emotional bond. And yeah, it can be depressing when rampant fanboyism rears it's ugly head. EDIT: ^ Like, say, in the post above mine, and the inevitable tide of "NO U! X RULES, Y SUCKS!" type of posts that will follow.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Thu Apr 30, 2009 4:10 pm If this turns into another Asuka v. Rei thread it ain't gonna last long.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Thu Apr 30, 2009 4:38 pm I like them both as well but I like Rei just a bit more though .

[]:             Quote Post by rberlin » Thu Apr 30, 2009 4:45 pm Never really cared much for Rei. Hated Asuka until EoE where I was like FUCK YEAH Asuka! So I guess you could say that for awhile Rei and Asuka were equally disliked.

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Thu Apr 30, 2009 4:58 pm SaltyJoe: I can see what you mean. Rei is a bit easier to get along with early on in the series, while Asuka has a lot to go through. Maybe if we had access to Rei's internal monologue, people would find her just as annoying. I do beg forgiveness from the mods! If we can get past a page without Rei vs. Asuka, then it is a victory! And by "equally"... I guess I mean you don't feel like there isn't room for both of them in your heart, hehe. I like Asuka a bit more than Rei, but it probably depends on the episode.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 30, 2009 5:33 pm I like both, but I like Asuka slightly more then Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Apr 30, 2009 9:43 pm I feel for both of them, but Asuka inspires pity while Rei calls for compassion.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Apr 30, 2009 10:18 pm Sometimes I fap to Rei. Sometimes I fap to Asuka. It really all depends on my mood.

[]:             Quote Post by Xeroko » Thu Apr 30, 2009 10:33 pm They're probably my two favorite characters, although I like Asuka more.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 01, 2009 12:39 am Sachi_13 wrote: Sometimes I fap to Rei. Sometimes I fap to Asuka. It really all depends on my mood.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat May 02, 2009 7:57 am In an objective sense, I probably pity Rei more because her characterization was essentially sacrificed to mold her into a plot device, but in actually identifying with the characters, Asuka's character did, indeed, touch me in ways difficult to describe, and I'm not one to let myself feel things easily. Since there’s no use in whining about what’s absent, Asuka would then win out for me.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat May 02, 2009 8:52 am ZapalacX wrote: If this turns into another Asuka v. Rei thread it ain't gonna last long.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sat May 02, 2009 1:47 pm I like Batman more than both of them.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat May 02, 2009 2:04 pm Ash wins.

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Sat May 02, 2009 2:59 pm What have I dooooone?!

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat May 02, 2009 3:53 pm oOoOoOo wrote: What have I dooooone?!

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sat May 02, 2009 4:44 pm Rei wins on a personal level, but Asuka is a study as well.
